questionHtml:
A car runs first 275km at an average speed of 50 km/h and the next 315 km at an average speed of 70 km/h. What is the average speed (in km) for the entire journey ? 

  1. 58.5

  2. 60

  3. 59

  4. 62
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
The angle of elevation of the top of an unfinished tower at a point distant 78 m from its base is 30°. How much higher must the tower be raised (in m) so that the angle of elevation of the top of the finished tower at the same point will be 60°?

  1. 783

  2. 80

  3. 523

  4. 263
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A vertical pole and a vertical tower are on the same level of ground in such a way that from the top of the pole, the angle of the elevation of the top of the tower is 60° and the angle of the depression of the bottom of the tower is 30°. If the height of the tower is 76 m, then find the height (in m) of the pole.

  1. 38

  2. 193

  3. 19

  4. 57
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
The ratio of speeds of two trains is 2 : 7. If the first train runs 250 km in 5 hours, then the sum of the speeds (in km/hr) of both the trains is:

  1. 250

  2. 175

  3. 150

  4. 225
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A and B started their journeys from X to Y and Y to X , respectively. After crossing each other, A and B completed remaining parts of their journeys in 61 8 hours and 8 hours, respectively. If the speed of A is 32 km/h then the speed , in km/h of B is:

  1. 21

  2. 28

  3. 30

  4. 25
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A pole 23 m long reaches a window which is 35 m above the ground on one side of a street. Keeping its foot at the same point, the pole is turned to the other side of the street to reach a window 415 m high. What is the width (in m) of the street?

  1. 17

  2. 35

  3. 39

  4. 22
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A journey of 900km is completed in 11 hours . If two-fifth of the journey is completed at the speed of 60km/h, at what speed(in km/h) is the remaining journey completed?

  1. 108

  2. 72

  3. 84

  4. 90
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A kite is attached to a string. Find the length of the string(in m) when the height of kite is 90 m and the string makes an angle of  30∘ with the ground.

  1. 180

  2. 903

  3. 45

  4. 603
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A train covers a distance of 225 km in 212 hours with a uniform speed. The time taken, in hours, so cover a distance of 450 km with the same speed is:

  1. 5

  2. 4

  3. 3

  4. 6
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A vertical pole and a vertical tower are on the same level ground in such a way that, from the top of pole, the angle of elevation of the top of the tower is 60° and the angle of depression of the bottom of the tower is 30°. If the height of the pole is 24 m, then find the height of the tower (in m).

  1. 243(3+ 1)

  2. 72

  3. 96

  4. 24(3+ 1)
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A train covers a distance of 225 km in 212 hours at a uniform speed. The time taken by the train (in hours) to cover a distance of 630 km at the same speed is :

  1. 5

  2. 7

  3. 6

  4. 4
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
The angle of elevation of the top of a tall building from the points M and N at the distances of 72m and 128m , respectively, from the base of the building and in the same straight line with it , are complementary . The height of the building ( in m ) is ?

  1. 84

  2. 96

  3. 80

  4. 90
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
The given histogram shows the height of 232 students of an athletic club and their number. 
Study the histogram carefully and answer the questions that follow

 
If the histogram is to be presented by a line graph , what would be the starting point and the end point of the line diagram

  1. (122.5, 20) and (167.5, 20)

  2. (117.5,0) and (172.5 , 0)

  3. (117.5 ,20) and (172.5 , 20)

  4. (122.5 ,0) and (167.5 ,0)
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A person travels 5x distance at a speed of 5 km/h, x distance at a speed of 5 km/h, and 4x distance at a speed of 6 km/h, and takes a total of 112 minutes. What is the total distance (in km) travelled by the person?

  1. 8

  2. 10

  3. 9

  4. 12
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
From a point P on the level ground, the angle of elevation of the top of the tower is 30° If the tower is 1103 m high, what is the distance(in m) of point P from the foot of the tower?

  1. 330

  2. 220

  3. 115

  4. 110
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
Shyam drives his car 30 km at a speed of 45 km/hr and, for the next 1 h 20 min, he drives it at a speed of 51 km/hr. Find his average speed(in km/hr) for the entire journey.

  1. 49

  2. 48

  3. 48.5

  4. 47
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A kite flying at a height of 120 m is attached to a string which makes an angle of 60° with the horizontal. What is the length of the string?

  1. 903

  2. 753

  3. 843

  4. 803
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A railway engine passes two bridge of length 400 m and 235 m in 100 seconds and 60 seconds respectively.Twice the length of the railway engine (in m) is :

  1. 24

  2. 25

  3. 12.5

  4. 12
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
From a point P on a level ground, the angle of elevation of the top of the tower is 30°. If the distance of point P from the foot of the tower is 510 m, then 50% of the height of the tower (in m) is: 

  1. 85

  2. 8533

  3. 853

  4. 1503
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A takes 3 hours more than B to walk “d” km. If A doubles his speed, then he can make it in 1 hour less than B. How much time (in hours) does A require to walk “d” km?

  1. 5

  2. 9

  3. 8

  4. 4
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
The length of the shadow on the ground of a tall tree of height 45 m is 153m. What is the angle ( in degrees) of elevation of the sun?

  1. 60°

  2. 45°

  3. 90°

  4. 30°
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A car covers a distance of 90 km in 50 min. What is the speed in (m/s)?

  1. 60

  2. 90

  3. 108

  4. 30
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
Two poles of height 10 m and 17 m are fixed on a level ground. The distance between the bottom of the poles is 24 m. What is the distance(in m) between their tops?

  1. 25

  2. 24

  3. 30

  4. 27
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
Exactly midway between the foot of two towers P and Q, the angle of elevation of their tops are 45° and 60°, respectively. The ratio of the heights of P and Q is:

  1. 1 : 3

  2. 3 : 1

  3. 1 : 3

  4. 3 : 1
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
Akhil rides first 12km at a speed of 16km/hr and further 6km at a speed of 20 km/hr . Find the average speed.(in Km/hr)

  1. 1815

  2. 1717

  3. 1712

  4. 1645
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
Study the given histogram that shows the height of 100 students in an athletic team and answer the following question.

Express the number of students with height less than 170 cm and as the percentage (correct to one decimal place) of the number of students with height more than 160 cm.

  1. 46.30%

  2. 73.50%

  3. 29.10%

  4. 53.70%
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
The given histogram shows the heights of 232 students of an athletic club and their numbers. Study the histogram carefully and answer the questions that follows.

What is the average height (in cm) of 32 tallest students of the athletic club?
Express your answer correct to one place of decimal.

  1. 165.4

  2. 167.4

  3. 166.4

  4. 164.4
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A poster is on top of a building. A person is standing on the ground at a distance of 50m from the building. The angles of elevation to the top of the poster and bottom of the poster are 45° and 30° , respectively . What is 200% of the height ( in m) of the poster?

  1. 253(3 -3)

  2. 753(3 -3)

  3. 503(3 -3)

  4. 1003(3 -3)
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
Ram travelled from a place Z to P at an average speed of 130km/h . He travelled the first 75% of the distance in two-third of the time and the rest at an average speed of x km/h. The value of x2 is:

  1. 51

  2. 48.75

  3. 97.5

  4. 19.25
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
From the top of a 195m high cliff, the angles of depression of the top and bottom of the tower are 30° and 60° respectively. Find the height of the tower(in m).

  1. 1953

  2. 195

  3. 130

  4. 65
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
If Raman drives his bike at a speed of 24km/hr, he reaches his office 5 minutes late. If he drives at a speed of 30 km/hr he reaches his office 4 minutes early . How much time (in minutes ) will he take to reach his office at a speed of 27km/hr?

  1. 45

  2. 55

  3. 40

  4. 50
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
The distance between two towns is covered in 7 hours at a speed of 50km/h . By how much should the speed (in km/h) be increased so that 2 hours of travelling time will be saved?

  1. 70

  2. 20

  3. 40

  4. 30
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
The length of the shadow on the ground of a tall tree of height 30 m is 103 m. What is the angle (In degrees) of elevation of the sun?

  1. 60

  2. 15

  3. 30

  4. 45
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A 20 m long ladder rests against a wall so that the angle between the ladder and the wall is 30°. How far (in m) is the base of the ladder from the wall?

  1. 103

  2. 203

  3. 20

  4. 10
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
What is the angle of elevation of the sun when the shadow of a 9-m high pole is 33 m long? 

  1. 30°

  2. 45°

  3. 60°

  4. 90°
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
The tops of two poles of height 18m and 30.5 m are connected by a wire . if the wire makes an angle of 30° with the horizontal , what is the length (in m) of the wire ?

  1. 20

  2. 25

  3. 28

  4. 36
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A and B are the two points on the same side of a ground , 50 meters apart . The angle of elevation of these points to the top of a tree are 60° and 30°, respectively. What is 40% of the height of the tree (in m) ?

  1. 103

  2. 153

  3. 53

  4. 253
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A ladder of length 3.5m just reaches the top of a wall. If the ladder makes an angle of 60° with the wall, then what is the height of the wall( in m) ?

  1. 1.75

  2. 3.53

  3. 734

  4. 3.53
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
The angle of depression of the boat from the masthead of a ship 180m high is 60 degrees. Find the distance of the boat from the ship.

  1. 360

  2. 603

  3. 1803

  4. 180
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
A ladder 18m long rests against a wall so that the angle between the ladder and the wall is 30° .How far (in m) is the base of the ladder from the wall

  1. 18

  2. 93

  3. 9

  4. 183
subject: Mathematics

questionHtml:
The length of the shadow of a vertical tower on level ground increases by 8.4 cm when The altitude of the sun changes from  45° to 30°. What is the height of the tower (in m)?

  1. 4.2(3-1)

  2. 8.4(3+3)

  3. 4.2(3+3)

  4. 4.2(3+1)
subject: Mathematics
